summary: Playback issues with the archive.org .m3u playlist are reported; no comments on audio or performance quality.
review: Both reviewers focus on technical problems related to the generated playlist links rather than the music itself. One user experiences linking errors (3★) while another reports successful playback using a different browser/OS (5★), leaving the actual recording and show quality unaddressed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews, both about playlist linking rather than sound; average star rating is 4 but there is insufficient information on musical or recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note problems with relative .m3u links causing playback failures in some browsers; no comments on audio clarity, mix, or source type.
